item.title: Kubernetes Falco
item.author: Author
item.description: Perform Behaviour Analytics of syscalls Analytics of syscalls We have to be noticed by unexpected executing of syscalls by crackers. So we have to build a system for that. Falco Falco Falco, the cloud-native runtime security project, is the de facto Kubernetes threat detection engine Falco Architecture Falco Install as a Package Download 1 2 3 curl -s https://falco.org/repo/falcosecurity-3672BA8F.asc | apt-key add - echo "deb https://download.
